plugins.//comment-md012: Multiple blank lines — instructional command files use them for visual separation.
plugins.//comment-md022: Blank lines around headings — too noisy for .claude/commands/ instructional content. Re-enable once those files are tightened in a follow-up PR.
plugins.//comment-md031: Blank lines around fenced code — same rationale as md022.
plugins.//comment-md032: Blank lines around lists — same rationale as md022.
plugins.//comment-md040: Fenced code language — encourage but don't gate. Many existing fences in .claude/commands/ are instructional pseudo-code, not syntactically-valid in any language.
plugins.//comment-md029: Ordered list numbering — legacy command files use non-1-based numbering for intent. Re-enable after a docs cleanup pass.
plugins.//comment-md033: Inline HTML — ADRs use anchor IDs for section linking; legitimate use, not noise.
